Document:
# Economy System Reference
Quick reference for the economy systems in OpenEdge 14.
## Systems
[bold]OE14Currency[/bold] — physical coin entities with a value. Coins exist as items in the world.
[bold]OE14Salary[/bold] — automatically pays coins to job holders over time. Configured per job prototype.
[bold]OE14TradingPlatform[/bold] — buy/sell system with dynamic pricing based on supply and demand.
## Adding an Item to the Shop
Trading platform listings are defined in prototypes:
- type: OE14TradingListing id: IronSwordListing entity: IronSword basePrice: 50 buyable: true sellable: true
## Currency Denominations
Coins come in different values. The trading platform handles exchange automatically.
## File Locations
- [mono]Content.Shared/_OE14/Economy/[/mono] - [mono]Content.Server/_OE14/Economy/[/mono] - [mono]Resources/Prototypes/_OE14/Economy/[/mono]
## Content Under Construction
Full economy system reference coming soon.
